prompt: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, Push'em All in-game moment: minimalist 3D sandy-green platform (#56a38b) floating in vibrant blue water (#2a7dfa), camera angled to reveal a stylized cross-section cutaway of the water beside the platform exposing flat-shaded cartoon sharks swimming underneath.
